title: The Indigenous Languages Technology project at NRC Canada: An empowerment-oriented approach to developing language software
research_areas: T16 Machine Translation (including Speech-to-Speech) and Translation Aids
T24 Speech Resources and Processing (including Phonetic Databases, Phonology, Prosody, Speech Recognition, Synthesis and Spoken Language Understanding)
